headline: Jim Cramer on SLB: “It Is By Far the Best There Is”
summary: SLB N.V. (NYSE:SLB) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money, as he advised investors to care about where a stock is going, not where it has been. Cramer discussed the company’s investor day meeting, as he said: What do we do with the oil service stocks now that peace seems to […]
